final_prompt.prompt:
Create a professional documentary-style banner image for Weibo news/hot-topic feature, capturing urban twilight with dramatic photojournalistic authenticity.

Style/medium: professional documentary photography with the raw immediacy of on-the-ground photojournalism, captured as if through a flagship smartphone lens in the hands of a practiced observer
Composition: wide panoramic 16:9 horizontal format with generous breathing room on left and right thirds for text overlay, eye-level street perspective
Subject: silhouetted pedestrians in hurried motion, the human rhythm of a city transitioning from day to night
Scene/backdrop: city skyline at twilight hour, distant skyscrapers catching the last amber light of sunset on their glass facades, neon signs beginning to glow along the street level
Lighting/mood: the dramatic tension between dying daylight and awakening neon, long shadows and warm-cool color contrast creating emotional weight
Color palette: the conversation between warm amber sunset and cool electric blue-pink neon, the chromatic breath of a city at the threshold of night
Materials/textures: the honest grain of high-ISO street photography, glass reflections with soft bokeh, asphalt and concrete underfoot
Text (verbatim):
  大标题："城市里的安静时刻"
  副文："黄昏，总能治愈一天的匆忙"
  水印："@龙爪槐守望者real · 生活观察"
Constraints: horizontal 16:9 aspect ratio, ample negative space for text placement in left and right thirds, all text elements must be clearly legible when overlaid
Avoid: oversaturated HDR look, artificial sharpening artifacts, generic stock-photo cityscape, Western city landmarks, empty stuffer language about resolution
